SPIR-V Shader - Brick Pattern

View SPIR-V (4974 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version 1.0
; Generator: claude-haiku
; Bound: 250
; Schema: 0
               OpCapability Shader
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %in_uv %in_normal %in_worldPos %out_color
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
               OpDecorate %in_uv Location 2
               OpDecorate %in_normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %in_worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %out_color Location 0
               OpDecorate %ubo_type Block
               OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 0 Offset 0 ColMajor MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 1 Offset 64 ColMajor MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 2 Offset 128 ColMajor MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %ubo_type 5 Offset 224

; Type declarations
       %void = OpTypeVoid
       %bool = OpTypeBool
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%ubo_type = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_type
%ptr_in_v2 = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_func_v2 = OpTypePointer Function %v2float
%ptr_func_v3 = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%ptr_func_v4 = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%ptr_func_f = OpTypePointer Function %float
%ptr_func_b = OpTypePointer Function %bool
%ptr_ubo_v4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Input/output variables
     %in_uv = OpVariable %ptr_in_v2 Input
  %in_normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
%in_worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
  %out_color = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4 Output
    %ubo_var = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform

; Constants
    %f_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
    %f_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
  %f_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
 %f_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
  %f_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
  %f_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
  %f_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
  %f_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
  %f_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
  %f_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9
    %f_2 = OpConstant %float 2.0
    %f_8 = OpConstant %float 8.0
   %f_16 = OpConstant %float 16.0
   %i_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
   %i_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%v2_scale = OpConstantComposite %v2float %f_8 %f_16
%v3_brick = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f_0_7 %f_0_2 %f_0_1
%v3_mortar = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f_0_7 %f_0_7 %f_0_7

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

       %main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
      %entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
     %uv = OpLoad %v2float %in_uv
    %norm = OpLoad %v3float %in_normal
   %wpos = OpLoad %v3float %in_worldPos

; Scale UV by (8, 16)
%uv_s = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %uv %v2_scale
%uv_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_s 0
%uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_s 1

; Row number and stagger offset
%row_f = OpExtInst %float %glsl Floor %uv_y
%row_mod = OpFRem %float %row_f %f_2
%row_gt = OpFOrdGreater %bool %row_mod %f_0_5
%x_off = OpSelect %float %row_gt %f_0_5 %f_0
%uv_xa = OpFAdd %float %uv_x %x_off

; Position within brick pattern
%x_pat = OpFRem %float %uv_xa %f_1
%y_pat = OpFRem %float %uv_y %f_1

; Check mortar in X direction [0.5, 0.55)
%xm_ge = OpFOrdGreaterThanEqual %bool %x_pat %f_0_5
%xm_end = OpFAdd %float %f_0_5 %f_0_05
%xm_lt = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %x_pat %xm_end
%is_xm = OpLogicalAnd %bool %xm_ge %xm_lt

; Check mortar in Y direction [0.9, 1.0)
%ym_ge = OpFOrdGreaterThanEqual %bool %y_pat %f_0_9
%is_ym = %ym_ge

; Combined mortar check
%is_mort = OpLogicalOr %bool %is_xm %is_ym

; Select color based on mortar
%surf_col = OpSelect %v3float %is_mort %v3_mortar %v3_brick

; Normalize normal
%n_norm = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %norm

; Load light position from UBO
%lp_ac = OpAccessChain %ptr_ubo_v4 %ubo_var %i_3
%lp = OpLoad %v4float %lp_ac
%lp_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lp %lp 0 1 2

; Calculate light direction
%ld = OpFSub %v3float %lp_xyz %wpos
%ld_n = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %ld

; Diffuse calculation
%diff = OpDot %float %n_norm %ld_n
%diff_c = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %diff %f_0

; Shading factor: 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse
%shade_mul = OpFMul %float %f_0_6 %diff_c
%shade = OpFAdd %float %f_0_4 %shade_mul

; Apply shading to color
%final = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %surf_col %shade

; Extract components and create output
%r = OpCompositeExtract %float %final 0
%g = OpCompositeExtract %float %final 1
%b = OpCompositeExtract %float %final 2
%out = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %r %g %b %f_1

; Store result
               OpStore %out_color %out
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

OpCapability Shader
OpExtInstImport %glsl "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %in_worldPos %in_normal %in_uv %in_tangent %in_color %out_outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpDecorate %in_worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %in_normal Location 1
OpDecorate %in_uv Location 2
OpDecorate %in_tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %in_color Location 4
OpDecorate %out_outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

OpDecorate %uboBuffer Binding 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4

%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_Uniform_vec4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4
%ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4

%func_void = OpTypeFunction %void

%uboBuffer = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
%in_worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%in_normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%in_uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%in_tangent = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%in_color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%out_outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_vec4 Output

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%float_0p5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
%bb_entry = OpLabel
  %ld_worldPos = OpLoad %vec3 %in_worldPos
  %ld_normal = OpLoad %vec3 %in_normal

  %cam_chain = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_vec4 %uboBuffer %int_4
  %ld_cam = OpLoad %vec4 %cam_chain
  %cam_vec3 = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %ld_cam %ld_cam 0 1 2

  %diff_vec = OpFSub %vec3 %cam_vec3 %ld_worldPos
  %v_norm = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl "Normalize" %diff_vec
  %n_norm = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl "Normalize" %ld_normal

  %dot_res = OpDot %float %n_norm %v_norm
  %ndotv = OpExtInst %float %glsl "FMax" %dot_res %float_0

  %is_less = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %ndotv %float_0p5

  OpBranchConditional %is_less %bb_then %bb_else

%bb_then = OpLabel
  %g_then = OpFMul %float %float_2 %ndotv
  %col_then = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %float_1 %g_then %float_0 %float_1
  OpBranch %bb_merge

%bb_else = OpLabel
  %nd_diff = OpFSub %float %ndotv %float_0p5
  %b_else = OpFMul %float %nd_diff %float_2
  %rg_sub = OpFMul %float %nd_diff %float_2
  %rg_else = OpFSub %float %float_1 %rg_sub
  %col_else = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %rg_else %rg_else %b_else %float_1
  OpBranch %bb_merge

%bb_merge = OpLabel
  %phi_color = OpPhi %vec4 %col_then %bb_then %col_else %bb_else
  OpStore %out_outColor %phi_color
  OpReturn

OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (6434 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Custom
; Bound: 200
; Schema: 0
OpCapability Shader
OpExtInstImport %ext "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inWorldPos %inNormal %inUV %inTangent %inColor %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
OpDecorate %inUV Location 2
OpDecorate %inTangent Location 3
OpDecorate %inColor Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

%void = OpTypeVoid
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_Uniform_vec4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4
%ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%ptr_Function_vec3 = OpTypePointer Function %vec3
%ptr_Function_vec4 = OpTypePointer Function %vec4

%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
%inWorldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inNormal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inUV = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%inTangent = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inColor = OpVariable %ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_vec4 Output

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_32 = OpConstant %float 32.0
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%vec3_ambient = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_0_1 %float_0_05 %float_0_05
%vec3_specular = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

%fn_void = OpTypeFunction %void

%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_void
%entry = OpLabel

%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%vertexColor = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%lightPos = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%cameraPos = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%N = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%L = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%V = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%R = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%negL = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%diffuseFactor = OpVariable %ptr_Function_float Function
%specularFactor = OpVariable %ptr_Function_float Function
%specularPower = OpVariable %ptr_Function_float Function
%ambientComponent = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%diffuseComponent = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%specularComponent = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%sum = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%clamped = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%result = OpVariable %ptr_Function_vec4 Function

; Load inputs
%wp = OpLoad %vec3 %inWorldPos
OpStore %worldPos %wp
%n = OpLoad %vec3 %inNormal
OpStore %normal %n
%vc = OpLoad %vec3 %inColor
OpStore %vertexColor %vc

; Load light and camera from UBO
%ptr_lp = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_vec4 %ubo %int_3
%lpv = OpLoad %vec4 %ptr_lp
%lp = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %lpv %lpv 0 1 2
OpStore %lightPos %lp

%ptr_cp = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_vec4 %ubo %int_4
%cpv = OpLoad %vec4 %ptr_cp
%cp = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %cpv %cpv 0 1 2
OpStore %cameraPos %cp

; Normalize normal
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %vec3 %normal
%normalized_normal = OpExtInst %vec3 %ext GLSLStd450 Normalize %loaded_normal
OpStore %N %normalized_normal

; Calculate L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
%loaded_lp = OpLoad %vec3 %lightPos
%loaded_wp = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
%L_diff = OpFSub %vec3 %loaded_lp %loaded_wp
%L_norm = OpExtInst %vec3 %ext GLSLStd450 Normalize %L_diff
OpStore %L %L_norm

; Calculate V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
%loaded_cp = OpLoad %vec3 %cameraPos
%V_diff = OpFSub %vec3 %loaded_cp %loaded_wp
%V_norm = OpExtInst %vec3 %ext GLSLStd450 Normalize %V_diff
OpStore %V %V_norm

; Calculate R = reflect(-L, N)
%loaded_L = OpLoad %vec3 %L
%neg_L = OpFNegate %vec3 %loaded_L
OpStore %negL %neg_L
%loaded_N = OpLoad %vec3 %N
%loaded_negL = OpLoad %vec3 %negL
%R_val = OpExtInst %vec3 %ext GLSLStd450 Reflect %loaded_negL %loaded_N
OpStore %R %R_val

; Ambient component = (0.1, 0.05, 0.05)
OpStore %ambientComponent %vec3_ambient

; Diffuse: vertex_color * max(dot(N,L), 0)
%loaded_N2 = OpLoad %vec3 %N
%loaded_L2 = OpLoad %vec3 %L
%dot_NL = OpDot %float %loaded_N2 %loaded_L2
%diff_factor = OpExtInst %float %ext GLSLStd450 FMax %dot_NL %float_0
OpStore %diffuseFactor %diff_factor
%loaded_vc = OpLoad %vec3 %vertexColor
%loaded_df = OpLoad %float %diffuseFactor
%diff_comp = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %loaded_vc %loaded_df
OpStore %diffuseComponent %diff_comp

; Specular: (1,1,1) * max(dot(R,V), 0)^32
%loaded_R = OpLoad %vec3 %R
%loaded_V = OpLoad %vec3 %V
%dot_RV = OpDot %float %loaded_R %loaded_V
%spec_factor = OpExtInst %float %ext GLSLStd450 FMax %dot_RV %float_0
OpStore %specularFactor %spec_factor
%loaded_sf = OpLoad %float %specularFactor
%spec_pow = OpExtInst %float %ext GLSLStd450 Pow %loaded_sf %float_32
OpStore %specularPower %spec_pow
%loaded_sp = OpLoad %float %specularPower
%spec_comp = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %vec3_specular %loaded_sp
OpStore %specularComponent %spec_comp

; Sum = ambient + diffuse + specular
%loaded_amb = OpLoad %vec3 %ambientComponent
%loaded_diff = OpLoad %vec3 %diffuseComponent
%sum1 = OpFAdd %vec3 %loaded_amb %loaded_diff
%loaded_spec = OpLoad %vec3 %specularComponent
%sum_all = OpFAdd %vec3 %sum1 %loaded_spec
OpStore %sum %sum_all

; Clamp to [0,1]
%loaded_sum = OpLoad %vec3 %sum
%clamped_val = OpExtInst %vec3 %ext GLSLStd450 FClamp %loaded_sum %float_0 %float_1
OpStore %clamped %clamped_val

; Create output vec4 with alpha 1.0
%loaded_clamped = OpLoad %vec3 %clamped
%final = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %loaded_clamped %float_1
OpStore %result %final

; Store to output
%loaded_result = OpLoad %vec4 %result
OpStore %outColor %loaded_result

OpReturn
%end = OpFunctionEnd

Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

 0.0000
Subprocess error: name '_save_rendered_image' is not defined

Geometry Shader - Points to Quads (points)

View SPIR-V (3024 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%arr_v3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1

%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel

%pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos = OpLoad %v4float %pos_ptr
%col_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_0
%col = OpLoad %v3float %col_ptr

%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 1

%x0 = OpFSub %float %x %float_0_04
%y0 = OpFSub %float %y %float_0_04
%v0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x0 %y0 %float_0 %float_1
%pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos0_ptr %v0
OpStore %outColor %col
OpEmitVertex

%x1 = OpFAdd %float %x %float_0_04
%y1 = OpFSub %float %y %float_0_04
%v1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x1 %y1 %float_0 %float_1
%pos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos1_ptr %v1
OpStore %outColor %col
OpEmitVertex

%x2 = OpFSub %float %x %float_0_04
%y2 = OpFAdd %float %y %float_0_04
%v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x2 %y2 %float_0 %float_1
%pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos2_ptr %v2
OpStore %outColor %col
OpEmitVertex

%x3 = OpFAdd %float %x %float_0_04
%y3 = OpFAdd %float %y %float_0_04
%v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x3 %y3 %float_0 %float_1
%pos3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos3_ptr %v3
OpStore %outColor %col
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%inNormal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input

%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3float Output

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
%entry = OpLabel

%pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos = OpLoad %v4float %pos_ptr

%color_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %inColor %int_0
%color = OpLoad %v3float %color_ptr

%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 1
%z = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 2
%w = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 3

%y_plus = OpFAdd %float %y %float_0_05
%top_v = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x %y_plus %z %w

%x_plus = OpFAdd %float %x %float_0_05
%right_v = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus %y %z %w

%x_minus = OpFSub %float %x %float_0_05

%y_minus = OpFSub %float %y %float_0_05
%bottom_v = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x %y_minus %z %w

%out_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4float %gl_out %int_0

OpStore %out_pos %top_v
OpStore %outColor %color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_pos %right_v
OpStore %outColor %color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_pos %left_v
OpStore %outColor %color
OpEmitVertex

OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn

       %main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type

      %addr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0

   %c0_addr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_color %color_in %int_0

   %c1_addr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_color %color_in %int_1
        %c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_addr
; Extract xy coordinates
    %p0_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p0 %p0 0 1
    %p1_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p1 %p1 0 1
; Compute direction: dir = p1 - p0
      %dir = OpFSub %v2float %p1_xy %p0_xy
; Perpendicular: (-dir.y, dir.x)
    %dir_x = OpVectorShuffle %float %dir %dir 0 0
    %dir_y = OpVectorShuffle %float %dir %dir 1 1
  %neg_y = OpFNegate %float %dir_y

; Compute length: sqrt(x^2 + y^2)
    %px = OpVectorShuffle %float %perp_unnorm %perp_unnorm 0 0
    %py = OpVectorShuffle %float %perp_unnorm %perp_unnorm 1 1
   %px2 = OpFMul %float %px %px
   %py2 = OpFMul %float %py %py
  %len2 = OpFAdd %float %px2 %py2
   %len = OpExtInst %float %1 Sqrt %len2
; Normalize: perp_norm = perp_unnorm / len

 %norm_y = OpFDiv %float %py %len
%norm_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %norm_x %norm_y
; Scale by thickness: perp = norm_vec * 0.03

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2

%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

%float_0p04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%float_0p005 = OpConstant %float 0.005

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float

%arr_color = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2

%ptr_out_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_gl_pv Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_color Input
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_gl_pv Output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3float Output

%fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type
%entry = OpLabel

; Load input positions
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr

; Load input colors
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color_in %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
%c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color_in %int_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

; Extract xyz components and w
%p0_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p0 %p0 0 1 2
%p1_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p1 %p1 0 1 2
%p0_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 3
%p1_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 3

; Compute direction vector
%dir = OpFSub %v3float %p1_xyz %p0_xyz

; Compute perpendicular: cross(dir, (0,0,1))
%z_axis = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_1
%perp_unnorm = OpCross %v3float %dir %z_axis
%perp = OpNormalize %v3float %perp_unnorm

; Emit vertex 0: p0 + perp * 0.04
%v0_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp %float_0p04
%v0_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p0_xyz %v0_offset
%v0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v0_xyz 0
%v0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v0_xyz 1
%v0_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %v0_xyz 2
%v0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v0_x %v0_y %v0_z %p0_w
%pos_ptr_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4float %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr_0 %v0
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

%v1_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v1_neg_offset %float_0p04
%v1_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p0_xyz %v1_offset
%v1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v1_xyz 0
%v1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v1_xyz 1
%v1_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %v1_xyz 2
%v1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_x %v1_y %v1_z %p0_w
OpStore %pos_ptr_0 %v1
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2: p1 + perp * 0.005
%v2_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp %float_0p005
%v2_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p1_xyz %v2_offset
%v2_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v2_xyz 0
%v2_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v2_xyz 1
%v2_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %v2_xyz 2
%v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_x %v2_y %v2_z %p1_w
OpStore %pos_ptr_0 %v2
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 3: p1 - perp * 0.005
%v3_neg_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp %float_m1
%v3_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3_neg_offset %float_0p005
%v3_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p1_xyz %v3_offset
%v3_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v3_xyz 0
%v3_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v3_xyz 1
%v3_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %v3_xyz 2
%v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_x %v3_y %v3_z %p1_w
OpStore %pos_ptr_0 %v3
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive

OpReturn

View SPIR-V (6163 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Manual
; Bound: 500
; Schema: 0
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor

OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 7
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 2

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%GLSL_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75

; Input gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; Input arrays
%arr_v3_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_in
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

; Output gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Output color
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; Function
%func_void = OpTypeFunction %void

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Load input positions
%ptr_p0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_p0
%ptr_p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_p1

; Load colors
%ptr_c0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_c0
%ptr_c1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_c1

; Extract XY for 2D calculations
%p0_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p0 %p0 0 1
%p1_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p1 %p1 0 1

; Compute direction
%dir = OpFSub %v2float %p1_xy %p0_xy

; Compute perpendicular: (-dir.y, dir.x)
%dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 0
%dir_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 1
%neg_dir_y = OpFNegate %float %dir_y
%perp_unnorm = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_dir_y %dir_x

; Normalize perpendicular
%perp_len_sq = OpDot %float %perp_unnorm %perp_unnorm
%perp_len = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_450 Sqrt %perp_len_sq
%perp_len_inv = OpFDiv %float %float_1 %perp_len
%perp = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp_unnorm %perp_len_inv

; Compute mid = p0 + 0.75 * (p1 - p0)
%diff = OpFSub %v2float %p1_xy %p0_xy
%diff_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %diff %float_0_75
%mid = OpFAdd %v2float %p0_xy %diff_scaled

; Extract Z and W for interpolation
%p0_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 2
%p0_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 3
%p1_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 2
%p1_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 3

; Interpolate Z and W at mid
%diff_z = OpFSub %float %p1_z %p0_z
%diff_z_scaled = OpFMul %float %diff_z %float_0_75
%mid_z = OpFAdd %float %p0_z %diff_z_scaled

%diff_w = OpFSub %float %p1_w %p0_w
%diff_w_scaled = OpFMul %float %diff_w %float_0_75
%mid_w = OpFAdd %float %p0_w %diff_w_scaled

; Compute shaft positions
%shaft_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp %float_0_015

%p0_left = OpFSub %v2float %p0_xy %shaft_offset
%p0_right = OpFAdd %v2float %p0_xy %shaft_offset
%mid_left = OpFSub %v2float %mid %shaft_offset
%mid_right = OpFAdd %v2float %mid %shaft_offset

; Extract components for v4 construction
%p0_left_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0_left 0
%p0_left_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0_left 1
%p0_right_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0_right 0
%p0_right_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0_right 1
%mid_left_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_left 0
%mid_left_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_left 1
%mid_right_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_right 0
%mid_right_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_right 1

; Construct shaft vertex positions
%v1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p0_left_x %p0_left_y %p0_z %p0_w
%v2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p0_right_x %p0_right_y %p0_z %p0_w
%v3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_left_x %mid_left_y %mid_z %mid_w
%v4_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_right_x %mid_right_y %mid_z %mid_w

; Emit shaft (4 vertices)
%out_v4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v1_pos
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v2_pos
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v3_pos
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v4_pos
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Compute arrowhead positions
%arrow_offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp %float_0_05

%mid_arrow_left = OpFSub %v2float %mid %arrow_offset
%mid_arrow_right = OpFAdd %v2float %mid %arrow_offset

; Extract components
%mid_al_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_arrow_left 0
%mid_al_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_arrow_left 1
%mid_ar_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_arrow_right 0
%mid_ar_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %mid_arrow_right 1

; Construct arrowhead vertex positions
%v5_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_al_x %mid_al_y %mid_z %mid_w
%v6_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_ar_x %mid_ar_y %mid_z %mid_w

; Emit arrowhead (3 vertices)
OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v5_pos
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %v6_pos
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %out_v4_ptr %p1
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (3489 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %inColor %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputTriangles
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpName %main "main"

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %inColor Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1

%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_pv_in_3 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
%ptr_input_arr = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in_3
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr Input

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_output_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_pv Output

%arr_v3_3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
%ptr_input_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_3
%inColor = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3 Input

%ptr_output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3 Output

%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%ptr_input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel

; Load positions from gl_in[0..2]
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr
%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr

; Load colors from inColor[0..2]
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %inColor %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
%c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %inColor %int_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr
%c2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %inColor %int_2
%c2 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr

; Compute centroid: C = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3
%p01 = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %p1
%p012 = OpFAdd %v4float %p01 %p2
%centroid = OpFDiv %v4float %p012 %float_3

; Shrink vertex 0: new_pos = C + 0.7 * (p0 - C)
%d0 = OpFSub %v4float %p0 %centroid
%sd0 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %d0 %float_0_7
%s0 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %sd0

; Shrink vertex 1: new_pos = C + 0.7 * (p1 - C)
%d1 = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %centroid
%sd1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %d1 %float_0_7
%s1 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %sd1

; Shrink vertex 2: new_pos = C + 0.7 * (p2 - C)
%d2 = OpFSub %v4float %p2 %centroid
%sd2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %d2 %float_0_7
%s2 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %sd2

; Emit vertex 0 with shrunk position and original color
%out_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_ptr0 %s0
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 1 with shrunk position and original color
%out_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_ptr1 %s1
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2 with shrunk position and original color
%out_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_ptr2 %s2
OpStore %outColor %c2
OpEmitVertex

; End the output primitive
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%void = OpTypeVoid
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0

%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

%float_neg025 = OpConstant %float -0.025

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float

%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

%ptr_in_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel

; Load input positions
%pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos0 = OpLoad %v4float %pos0_ptr
%pos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%pos1 = OpLoad %v4float %pos1_ptr
%pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%pos2 = OpLoad %v4float %pos2_ptr
%pos3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_3 %int_0
%pos3 = OpLoad %v4float %pos3_ptr

; Load colors
%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color %int_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; Extract xyz components for tangent calculation
%pos0_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos0 %pos0 0 1 2
%pos1_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos1 %pos1 0 1 2
%pos2_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos2 %pos2 0 1 2
%pos3_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos3 %pos3 0 1 2

; Compute tangent at start: t0 = normalize(pos2 - pos0)
%diff0 = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_xyz %pos0_xyz
%t0 = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %diff0

; Compute tangent at end: t1 = normalize(pos3 - pos1)
%diff1 = OpFSub %v3float %pos3_xyz %pos1_xyz
%t1 = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %diff1

; Extract 2D tangents (xy components)
%t0_2d = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %t0 %t0 0 1
%t1_2d = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %t1 %t1 0 1

; Create perpendiculars: perp = (-t.y, t.x)
%t0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %t0_2d 0
%t0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %t0_2d 1
%neg_t0_y = OpFNegate %float %t0_y
%perp0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_t0_y %t0_x

%t1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %t1_2d 0
%t1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %t1_2d 1
%neg_t1_y = OpFNegate %float %t1_y
%perp1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_t1_y %t1_x

; Get start and end XY positions
%pos1_2d = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %pos1_xyz %pos1_xyz 0 1
%pos2_2d = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %pos2_xyz %pos2_xyz 0 1

; Extract z and w from start and end positions
%pos1_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos1 2
%pos1_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos1 3
%pos2_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 2
%pos2_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 3

; Scale perpendiculars by thickness
%perp0_thick = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp0 %float_025
%perp0_neg_thick = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp0 %float_neg025
%perp1_thick = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp1 %float_025
%perp1_neg_thick = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp1 %float_neg025

; Vertex 1: start + perp0*thickness
%v1_2d = OpFAdd %v2float %pos1_2d %perp0_thick
%v1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v1_2d 0
%v1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v1_2d 1
%v1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_x %v1_y %pos1_z %pos1_w
%out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4float %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v1_pos
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: start - perp0*thickness
%v2_2d = OpFAdd %v2float %pos1_2d %perp0_neg_thick
%v2_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v2_2d 0
%v2_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v2_2d 1
%v2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_x %v2_y %pos1_z %pos1_w
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v2_pos
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: end + perp1*thickness
%v3_2d = OpFAdd %v2float %pos2_2d %perp1_thick
%v3_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v3_2d 0
%v3_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v3_2d 1
%v3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_x %v3_y %pos2_z %pos2_w
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v3_pos
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4: end - perp1*thickness
%v4_2d = OpFAdd %v2float %pos2_2d %perp1_neg_thick
%v4_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %v4_2d 0
%v4_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %v4_2d 1
%v4_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v4_x %v4_y %pos2_z %pos2_w
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v4_pos
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%seg2_col_b = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %c2 %float_0_667
%seg2_color = OpFAdd %v3float %seg2_col_a %seg2_col_b

%perp_avg = OpFAdd %v3float %perp_in_norm %perp_out_norm
%perp_avg_norm = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %perp_avg
%perp_avg_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp_avg_norm %float_0_02

%seg2_v0 = OpFAdd %v3float %seg2_center %perp_avg_scaled
%seg2_v0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v0 0
%seg2_v0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v0 1
%seg2_v0_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v0 2
%seg2_v0_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %seg2_v0_x %seg2_v0_y %seg2_v0_z %float_1

%seg2_v1 = OpFSub %v3float %seg2_center %perp_avg_scaled
%seg2_v1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v1 0
%seg2_v1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v1 1
%seg2_v1_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v1 2
%seg2_v1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %seg2_v1_x %seg2_v1_y %seg2_v1_z %float_1

%seg2_v2 = OpFAdd %v3float %seg2_center %perp_out_scaled
%seg2_v2_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v2 0
%seg2_v2_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v2 1
%seg2_v2_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v2 2
%seg2_v2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %seg2_v2_x %seg2_v2_y %seg2_v2_z %float_1

%seg2_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %seg2_center %perp_out_scaled
%seg2_v3_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v3 0
%seg2_v3_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v3 1
%seg2_v3_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %seg2_v3 2
%seg2_v3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %seg2_v3_x %seg2_v3_y %seg2_v3_z %float_1

OpStore %pos_out_0 %seg2_v0_pos
OpStore %outColor %seg2_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %pos_out_0 %seg2_v1_pos
OpStore %outColor %seg2_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %pos_out_0 %seg2_v2_pos
OpStore %outColor %seg2_color
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %pos_out_0 %seg2_v3_pos
OpStore %outColor %seg2_color
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Silhouette Edges (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (6442 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 15
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_in Flat

OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_001 = OpConstant %float 0.001
%float_0_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_minus1 = OpConstant %float -1.0

%v3_white = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_v4_6 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%ptr_Input_arr_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v4_6
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v4 Input

%arr_v3_6 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_Input_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_6
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input

%ptr_Input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex Output

%ptr_Output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3 Output
%ptr_Output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%func_main = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_main
%label = OpLabel

; Load main triangle vertices (indices 0, 2, 4)
%ac0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos0 = OpLoad %v4float %ac0
%ac_c0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_in %int_0
%col0 = OpLoad %v3float %ac_c0

%ac2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%pos2 = OpLoad %v4float %ac2
%ac_c2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_in %int_2
%col2 = OpLoad %v3float %ac_c2

%ac4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%pos4 = OpLoad %v4float %ac4
%ac_c4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_in %int_4
%col4 = OpLoad %v3float %ac_c4

; Load adjacent vertices (indices 1, 3, 5)
%ac1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%pos1 = OpLoad %v4float %ac1

%ac3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_3 %int_0
%pos3 = OpLoad %v4float %ac3

%ac5 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_5 %int_0
%pos5 = OpLoad %v4float %ac5

; Extract xyz for boundary detection
%p0xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos0 %pos0 0 1 2
%p1xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos1 %pos1 0 1 2
%p2xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos2 %pos2 0 1 2
%p3xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos3 %pos3 0 1 2
%p4xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos4 %pos4 0 1 2
%p5xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos5 %pos5 0 1 2

; Check Edge 0→2 (adjacent is 1) - boundary if pos1 matches pos0 or pos2
%e0_d1 = OpFSub %v3float %p1xyz %p0xyz
%e0_l1 = OpDot %float %e0_d1 %e0_d1
%e0_c1 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e0_l1 %float_0_001

%e0_d2 = OpFSub %v3float %p1xyz %p2xyz
%e0_l2 = OpDot %float %e0_d2 %e0_d2
%e0_c2 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e0_l2 %float_0_001

%e0_is_bound = OpLogicalOr %bool %e0_c1 %e0_c2

; Check Edge 2→4 (adjacent is 3)
%e1_d1 = OpFSub %v3float %p3xyz %p2xyz
%e1_l1 = OpDot %float %e1_d1 %e1_d1
%e1_c1 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e1_l1 %float_0_001

%e1_d2 = OpFSub %v3float %p3xyz %p4xyz
%e1_l2 = OpDot %float %e1_d2 %e1_d2
%e1_c2 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e1_l2 %float_0_001

%e1_is_bound = OpLogicalOr %bool %e1_c1 %e1_c2

; Check Edge 4→0 (adjacent is 5)
%e2_d1 = OpFSub %v3float %p5xyz %p4xyz
%e2_l1 = OpDot %float %e2_d1 %e2_d1
%e2_c1 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e2_l1 %float_0_001

%e2_d2 = OpFSub %v3float %p5xyz %p0xyz
%e2_l2 = OpDot %float %e2_d2 %e2_d2
%e2_c2 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %e2_l2 %float_0_001

%e2_is_bound = OpLogicalOr %bool %e2_c1 %e2_c2

; Emit triangle with dimmed colors
%col0_dim = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %col0 %float_0_3
%pos_store = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_store %pos0
OpStore %outColor %col0_dim
OpEmitVertex

%col2_dim = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %col2 %float_0_3
OpStore %pos_store %pos2
OpStore %outColor %col2_dim
OpEmitVertex

%col4_dim = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %col4 %float_0_3
OpStore %pos_store %pos4
OpStore %outColor %col4_dim
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Emit Edge 0→2 if boundary
OpSelectionMerge %merge0 None
OpBranchConditional %e0_is_bound %then0 %merge0
%then0 = OpLabel
  OpStore %pos_store %pos0
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos2
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos0
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos2
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive
  OpBranch %merge0
%merge0 = OpLabel

; Emit Edge 2→4 if boundary
OpSelectionMerge %merge1 None
OpBranchConditional %e1_is_bound %then1 %merge1
%then1 = OpLabel
  OpStore %pos_store %pos2
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos4
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos2
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos4
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive
  OpBranch %merge1
%merge1 = OpLabel

; Emit Edge 4→0 if boundary
OpSelectionMerge %merge2 None
OpBranchConditional %e2_is_bound %then2 %merge2
%then2 = OpLabel
  OpStore %pos_store %pos4
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos0
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos4
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpStore %pos_store %pos0
  OpStore %outColor %v3_white
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive
  OpBranch %merge2
%merge2 = OpLabel

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

[Flat-Shaded Triangles] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 4: 1: Expected at the beginning of an instruction, found 'OpExtInstImport'.

Geometry Shader - Flat-Shaded Triangles (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (4404 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %glsl "GLSL.std.450"
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %outColor_var %worldPos_var %normal_var %color_var
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

OpDecorate %worldPos_var Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_var Location 1
OpDecorate %color_var Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor_var Location 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1

%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%float_0p2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0p8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0p333333 = OpConstant %float 0.333333

%v1_1_1 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_6_gl_PerVertex = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%ptr_Input_arr = OpTypePointer Input %arr_6_gl_PerVertex
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr Input

%arr_6_v3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_Input_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_6_v3
%worldPos_var = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input
%normal_var = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input
%color_var = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3 Input

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex Output

%ptr_Output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor_var = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3 Output

%ptr_Input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry_block = OpLabel

; Load main triangle vertices (indices 0, 2, 4)
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr
%p4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%p4 = OpLoad %v4float %p4_ptr

; Extract XYZ components
%v0 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p0 %p0 0 1 2
%v2 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2 %p2 0 1 2
%v4 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p4 %p4 0 1 2

; Compute edge vectors: p2-p0 and p4-p0
%edge1 = OpFSub %v3float %v2 %v0
%edge2 = OpFSub %v3float %v4 %v0

; Compute cross product: cross(edge1, edge2)
%cross = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Cross %edge1 %edge2

; Normalize to get face normal
%face_normal = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %cross

; Normalize light direction
%light_norm = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %v1_1_1

; Compute diffuse: max(dot(N, L), 0)
%dot_val = OpDot %float %face_normal %light_norm
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %dot_val %float_0

; Load colors and compute average
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_var %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
%c2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_var %int_2
%c2 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr
%c4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color_var %int_4
%c4 = OpLoad %v3float %c4_ptr

%sum1 = OpFAdd %v3float %c0 %c2
%sum2 = OpFAdd %v3float %sum1 %c4
%base_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %sum2 %float_0p333333

; Compute shading factor: 0.2 + 0.8 * diffuse
%diffuse_scaled = OpFMul %float %float_0p8 %diffuse
%shade_factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0p2 %diffuse_scaled

; Apply shading to base color
%final_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color %shade_factor

; Emit vertex 0
%out_pos_ptr_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos_ptr_0 %p0
OpStore %outColor_var %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2
%out_pos_ptr_2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos_ptr_2 %p2
OpStore %outColor_var %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 4
%out_pos_ptr_4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_pos_ptr_4 %p4
OpStore %outColor_var %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; End the triangle strip
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Test 43: Fragment Shaders (HLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing an HLSL pixel (fragment) shader for Vulkan. The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator (-D flag for HLSL mode) targeting Vulkan 1.0,
then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):**
```hlsl
struct PSInput {
[[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0; // world-space position
[[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
[[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
[[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3; // tangent vector
[[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};
```

**Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```hlsl
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
float4x4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
float4x4 view; // offset 64
float4x4 projection; // offset 128
float4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
float4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
float4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```hlsl
float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**HLSL requirements:**
- Use Vulkan-specific attributes: `[[vk::location(N)]]` for inputs, `[[vk::binding(B, S)]]` for UBO
- Entry point must be named `main`
- Return type is `float4` with `SV_Target0` semantic
- Standard HLSL intrinsics are available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, lerp, etc.
- Use `mul()` for matrix-vector operations if needed

**Write ONLY the complete HLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

The code is compiled to SPIR-V behind the scenes and rendered; the output is compared pixel-by-pixel against the reference images.

HLSL Shader - Normal to RGB

View HLSL (629 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 normal = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 mapped = (normal + 1.0) * 0.5;
    return float4(mapped, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Lambertian Diffuse

View HLSL (675 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;

};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    return float4(d, d, d, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Phong Specular

View HLSL (910 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32.0);

    float intensity = 0.2 + 0.5 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Blinn-Phong

View HLSL (916 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float3 H = normalize(L + V);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    float specular = pow(max(dot(N, H), 0.0), 64.0);

    float intensity = 0.1 + 0.6 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Rim Lighting

View HLSL (967 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    float rim = pow(1.0 - max(dot(N, V), 0.0), 3.0);

    float3 baseColor = float3(0.2, 0.3, 0.8);
    float3 color = baseColor * (0.3 + 0.5 * diffuse);

    float3 rimTint = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.5);
    color += rimTint * rim;

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Toon Shading

View HLSL (909 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    float band;
    if (d >= 0.75) {
        band = 1.0;
    } else if (d >= 0.5) {
        band = 0.7;
    } else if (d >= 0.25) {
        band = 0.4;
    } else {
        band = 0.2;
    }

    float3 result = input.color * band;

    return float4(result, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Checkerboard

View HLSL (1186 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Create 8x8 checkerboard pattern
    float2 checkerUV = input.uv * 8.0;
    int2 checkerPos = int(checkerUV);

    // Determine checkerboard color based on parity
    float checkerColor = ((checkerPos.x + checkerPos.y) % 2 == 0) ? 0.9 : 0.2;

    // Calculate Lambertian shading
    float3 normal = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(dot(normal, lightDir), 0.0);

    // Apply shading factor: (0.5 + 0.5*diffuse)
    float shadingFactor = 0.5 + 0.5 * diffuse;

    // Final color with shading applied
    float3 finalColor = checkerColor * shadingFactor;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Horizontal Stripes

View HLSL (954 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 normal = normalize(input.normal);

    float stripe = sin(input.uv.y * 3.14159 * 16.0);
    float3 stripeColor = (stripe > 0.0) ? float3(0.9, 0.1, 0.1) : float3(0.1, 0.1, 0.9);

    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(dot(normal, lightDir), 0.0);
    float shadingFactor = 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse;

    float3 finalColor = stripeColor * shadingFactor;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Polka Dots

View HLSL (1319 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // 6x6 grid pattern
    float2 cellCoord = input.uv * 6.0;
    float2 cellCenter = floor(cellCoord) + 0.5;
    float2 cellOffset = cellCoord - cellCenter;

    // Distance from cell center
    float dist = length(cellOffset);

    // Determine color based on distance from cell center
    float3 baseColor;
    if (dist < 0.3) {
        baseColor = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.0); // yellow dots
    } else {
        baseColor = float3(0.1, 0.1, 0.3); // dark blue background
    }

    // Lambertian shading
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(N, L));
    float shadingFactor = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse;

    // Apply shading and output
    float3 finalColor = baseColor * shadingFactor;
    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Hemisphere Lighting

View HLSL (963 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 normal = normalize(input.normal);

    float3 skyColor = float3(0.4, 0.6, 1.0);
    float3 groundColor = float3(0.3, 0.15, 0.05);
    float blendFactor = normal.y * 0.5 + 0.5;
    float3 ambientColor = lerp(groundColor, skyColor, blendFactor);

    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float d = max(0.0, dot(normal, lightDir));

    float3 finalColor = ambientColor + 0.3 * d;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Y-Gradient

View HLSL (724 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float t = clamp(input.worldPos.y * 0.5 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
    float3 bottom = float3(0.1, 0.4, 0.1);
    float3 top = float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0);
    float3 finalColor = lerp(bottom, top, t);
    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Fog Effect

View HLSL (1031 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 norm = normalize(input.normal);

    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(dot(norm, lightDir), 0.0);

    float lambertian = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse;

    float3 baseColor = float3(0.8, 0.2, 0.2) * lambertian;

    float dist = distance(input.worldPos, cameraPos.xyz);

    float fogFactor = clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0);

    float3 fogColor = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.8);

    float3 result = lerp(baseColor, fogColor, fogFactor);

    return float4(result, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Gooch Shading

View HLSL (812 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float t = dot(N, L) * 0.5 + 0.5;

    float3 cool = float3(0.2, 0.2, 0.75);
    float3 warm = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.4);

    float3 finalColor = lerp(cool, warm, t);

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Mandelbrot Set

View HLSL (1248 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Map UVs to complex plane: c = (uv.x*3-2, uv.y*2-1)
    float2 c = float2(input.uv.x * 3.0 - 2.0, input.uv.y * 2.0 - 1.0);

    // Mandelbrot iteration
    float2 z = float2(0.0, 0.0);
    int iterations = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
        // Check escape condition: |z|^2 > 4
        float mag_sq = dot(z, z);
        if (mag_sq > 4.0) {
            break;
        }

        // z = z^2 + c
        float2 z_sq = float2(z.x * z.x - z.y * z.y, 2.0 * z.x * z.y);
        z = z_sq + c;

        iterations++;
    }

    // Color with t = iterations/20 as (t, t*0.5, 1.0-t), alpha 1.0
    float t = float(iterations) / 20.0;
    float r = t;
    float g = t * 0.5;
    float b = 1.0 - t;

    return float4(r, g, b, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Brick Pattern

View HLSL (1783 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Scale UV coordinates for 8x16 brick pattern
    float2 scaledUV = input.uv * float2(8.0, 16.0);

    // Get the row index for staggering
    int rowIndex = int(floor(scaledUV.y));

    // Stagger: offset by 0.5 for odd rows
    if ((rowIndex % 2) == 1) {
        scaledUV.x += 0.5;
    }

    // Get fractional part within each brick cell
    float2 fracUV = frac(scaledUV);

    // Mortar thickness
    float mortarX = 0.05;
    float mortarY = 0.1;

    // Determine if this pixel is in mortar or brick
    bool inMortarX = fracUV.x < mortarX || fracUV.x > (1.0 - mortarX);
    bool inMortarY = fracUV.y < mortarY || fracUV.y > (1.0 - mortarY);
    bool inMortar = inMortarX || inMortarY;

    // Colors
    float3 mortarColor = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.7);
    float3 brickColor = float3(0.7, 0.2, 0.1);

    // Select color based on mortar/brick
    float3 finalColor = inMortar ? mortarColor : brickColor;

    // Apply Lambertian shading
    float3 normal = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 lightDir = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(0.0, dot(normal, lightDir));
    float shadingFactor = 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse;

    // Apply shading to color
    finalColor *= shadingFactor;

    // Return with full alpha
    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View HLSL (892 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0.0);

    float3 finalColor;
    if (NdotV < 0.5) {
        finalColor = float3(1.0, 2.0 * NdotV, 0.0);
    } else {
        float t = (NdotV - 0.5) * 2.0;
        finalColor = float3(1.0 - t, 1.0 - t, t);
    }

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Full Phong Model

View HLSL (978 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    float3 ambient = float3(0.1, 0.05, 0.05);
    float3 diffuse = input.color * max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float3 specular = float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0) * pow(max(dot(V, R), 0.0), 32.0);

    float3 result = clamp(ambient + diffuse + specular, 0.0, 1.0);

    return float4(result, 1.0);
}

Test 44: Fragment Shaders (GLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a GLSL fragment shader for Vulkan (GLSL 450). The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator targeting Vulkan 1.0, then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader):**
```glsl
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos; // world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent; // tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
```

**Available uniform buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```glsl
layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
mat4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
mat4 view; // offset 64
mat4 projection; // offset 128
vec4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
vec4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
vec4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
} ubo;
```

**Required output:**
```glsl
layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor; // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**GLSL requirements:**
- Must start with `#version 450`
- Use `layout(location = N)` for inputs/outputs
- Use `layout(set = 0, binding = 0)` for the UBO
- Standard GLSL built-ins available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, mix, etc.
- Entry point must be `void main()`

**Write ONLY the complete GLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

The code is compiled to SPIR-V and rendered; the output is compared pixel-by-pixel against the reference images.

GLSL Shader - Phong Specular

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (783 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;
    mat4 view;
    mat4 projection;
    vec4 lightPos;
    vec4 cameraPos;
    vec4 params;
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;

void main()
{
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 V = normalize(ubo.cameraPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32.0);

    float intensity = 0.2 + 0.5 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    outColor = vec4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

GLSL Shader - Blinn-Phong

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (769 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;
    mat4 view;
    mat4 projection;
    vec4 lightPos;
    vec4 cameraPos;
    vec4 params;
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;

void main() {
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 V = normalize(ubo.cameraPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 H = normalize(L + V);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float specular = pow(max(dot(N, H), 0.0), 64.0);

    float intensity = 0.1 + 0.6 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;

    outColor = vec4(vec3(intensity), 1.0);
}

GLSL Shader - Rim Lighting

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (846 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;
    mat4 view;
    mat4 projection;
    vec4 lightPos;
    vec4 cameraPos;
    vec4 params;
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;

void main()
{
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);
    vec3 V = normalize(ubo.cameraPos.xyz - worldPos);

    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float rim = pow(1.0 - max(dot(N, V), 0.0), 3.0);

    vec3 baseColor = vec3(0.2, 0.3, 0.8);
    vec3 finalColor = baseColor * (0.3 + 0.5 * diffuse);

    vec3 rimTint = vec3(1.0, 0.8, 0.5);
    finalColor += rimTint * rim;

    outColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

GLSL Shader - Toon Shading

Approach: version 450

View GLSL (784 chars)
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos;
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal;
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv;
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent;
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color;

layout(set = 0, binding = 0) uniform UBO {
    mat4 model;
    mat4 view;
    mat4 projection;
    vec4 lightPos;
    vec4 cameraPos;
    vec4 params;
} ubo;

layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor;

void main()
{
    vec3 N = normalize(normal);
    vec3 L = normalize(ubo.lightPos.xyz - worldPos);

    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    float band;
    if (d > 0.75) {
        band = 1.0;
    } else if (d > 0.5) {
        band = 0.7;
    } else if (d > 0.25) {
        band = 0.4;
    } else {
        band = 0.2;
    }

    vec3 finalColor = color * band;
    outColor = vec4(finalColor, 1.0);
}
